title: sharkmer panel
description: Schema for sharkmer primer panel YAML files (schema_version: "2").

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL. Enables inline validation and autocomplete in editors such as VS Code (with the YAML extension) and JetBrains IDEs.

name.description: Machine-readable panel identifier. Used as the output filename prefix unless gene_prefix is set. No spaces.

schema_version.description: Panel schema version. Must be the string "2" for v2 panels.

panel_version.description: Semantic version of the panel (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH). Increment PATCH for primer tweaks, MINOR for new primers, MAJOR for breaking changes.

description.description: Human-readable description of the panel and its intended use.

clade.description: NCBI-preferred taxon name for the target clade (e.g. "Cnidaria", "Insecta").

taxon_id.description: NCBI Taxonomy ID for the clade. See https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/taxonomy

gene_prefix.description: Optional override for the prefix prepended to gene names in output filenames. Falls back to `name` when absent.

status.description: Panel lifecycle status. sharkmer warns when a deprecated panel is loaded.

source_url.description: URL where this panel file can be obtained. Logged at load time for reproducibility.

citation.description: Citation for the panel itself (distinct from per-primer citations). Cite the paper that validated this panel's performance.

changelog.description: Ordered list of panel changes, most recent first.

primers.description: Primer pairs in this panel. All entries run independently; there is no priority ordering.

references.description: Gold-standard reference amplicon sequences for validation. Consumed by validate_panel.py, not by the Rust binary.

validation.description: Validation configuration. Consumed by validate_panel.py, not by the Rust binary.

sharkmer_version.description: sharkmer version used when this panel version was tested.

gene.description: Gene being targeted (e.g. "CO1", "18S"). Must not contain '_'. Must not contain '-' when `region` is also set.

region.description: Optional sub-region label (e.g. "V9", "V5-V7"). Must not contain '_'.

index.description: Optional positive integer distinguishing multiple primer pairs for the same (gene, region). Required when two primer entries share the same (gene, region).

forward_seq.description: 5'-to-3' forward primer sequence (IUPAC nucleotide codes allowed).

reverse_seq.description: 5'-to-3' reverse primer sequence (IUPAC nucleotide codes allowed).

max_length.description: Maximum acceptable amplicon length (bp), inclusive. Must be >= min_length.

min_count.description: Minimum kmer count required to seed the De Bruijn graph. Default: 2.

mismatches.description: Number of mismatches allowed per primer end during kmer expansion. Default: 2.

trim.description: Bases to trim from each primer end when seeding the graph (must be ≤ k−1 = 18). Default: 15.

compartment.description: Cellular compartment using INSDC /organelle vocabulary. Absent implies nuclear.

gene_type.description: Gene/transcript type. Uses NCBI RefSeq gene_biotype values with rRNA_SSU, rRNA_LSU, rRNA_5S, and ITS extensions.

deprecated.description: If true, sharkmer warns when this primer is used but still runs it. Default: false.

deprecated_by.description: Derived output name of the replacement primer entry (e.g. "CO1_2").

expected_length.description: Expected amplicon length (bp). Informational; used in validation reports.

citation.description: Source citation for these primer sequences.

notes.description: Free-text notes about this primer pair.

dedup_edit_threshold.description: Expert tuning: Levenshtein edit distance below which near-duplicate amplicons are merged. Default: 10.

max_dfs_states.description: Expert tuning: Maximum DFS state budget during path enumeration. Default: 100000.

max_paths_per_pair.description: Expert tuning: Maximum paths returned per primer pair before truncation. Default: 20.

max_node_visits.description: Expert tuning: Maximum times a node may be revisited during DFS (cycle tolerance). Default: 2.

max_primer_kmers.description: Expert tuning: Maximum primer kmer variants after ambiguity/mismatch expansion. Default: 40.

high_coverage_ratio.description: Expert tuning: Coverage ratio above which an edge is treated as a repeat and filtered. Default: 10.0.

tip_coverage_fraction.description: Expert tuning: Coverage fraction below which a tip edge is pruned. Default: 0.1.

gene.description: Derived output name for this gene (e.g. "CO1", "18S-V9", "CO1_1"). Must match the name sharkmer writes to the output FASTA filename.

max_reads.description: Read depth tiers to validate at (e.g. [1000000, 4000000, 16000000]).

expected.description: Deprecated: expected gene recovery thresholds from older runs. Kept for backward compatibility.
